news.headline: KPM Analytics expands AI and software in new Utah facility to drive innovation in food safety. Dec. 10, 2024. (Character count: 103)
news.summary: KPM Analytics has recently opened a cutting-edge facility in Orem, Utah, marking a significant step in the expansion of their Artificial Intelligence and software development endeavors within their brand portfolio. The company, headquartered in Westborough, Mass., made this move on December 10, 2024. KPM is known for its leadership in food safety and quality assurance. This new facility is expected to bolster their operations and innovation in this field.

news.headline: Clearwater named best in business for cybersecurity by Modern Healthcare. Leading in helping healthcare orgs, based in Nashville.
news.summary: A prominent industry publication recently spotlighted a company's achievements in aiding healthcare organizations to enhance their security, compliance, and resilience. Based in Nashville, Tennessee, Clearwater, the primary dedicated provider of cybersecurity and compliance solutions, garnered recognition for its initiatives. The publication highlighted Clearwater's efforts in supporting healthcare entities to fortify their measures and ensure compliance with stringent regulations. This acknowledgment reflects the company's commitment to assisting the healthcare sector in bolstering their security protocols. The news was unveiled on December 10, 2024.

news.headline: Aventon Companies appoints David Singer as MD, opens Atlanta office. Plans to launch third property in Georgia by 2025.
news.summary: A well-known apartment development company, Aventon Companies, has revealed plans to launch their third property in the state by 2025. This firm, recognized for its work in multifamily development and general contracting, operates across the Mid-Atlantic and Southeast regions. Aventon Companies is set to expand its portfolio, showcasing its dedication to growth and innovation in the industry. The successful development and construction firm continues to make strides in the real estate market, aiming to provide quality living spaces for residents.

news.headline: Bybit launches On-Chain Earn, offering up to 3% APR with $cmETH and Guaranteed ETH rewards; the world's second-largest crypto exchange.
news.summary: In Dubai, UAE, on December 10, 2024, a major cryptocurrency exchange, Bybit, revealed the introduction of its cmETH On-Chain Earn Party. This event allows users to earn a maximum of 3% APR by pledging $cmETH during the specified period. Bybit, ranking as the second-largest cryptocurrency exchange globally in terms of trading volume, aims to provide this opportunity to its users.

news.headline: Adobe (ADBE) is set to report quarterly earnings on 2024-12-11 with EPS estimated at $4.67. Past EPS beats led to price drops. Stock trading at $547.93, down 12.23% in 52 weeks. Analysts highlight the importance of keeping up with market sentiments on Adobe.
news.summary: Adobe (NASDAQ:ADBE) is set to announce its quarterly earnings on 2024-12-11 with analysts predicting an EPS of $4.67. Investors are hopeful for positive news exceeding estimates and future growth guidance. In the last earnings report, Adobe surpassed EPS by $0.12, causing an 8.47% drop in share price subsequently. Over the last year, Adobe’s stock has decreased by 12.23%, with mixed price changes after previous earnings releases. The stock was trading at $547.93 on 2024-12-09, leaving long-term investors concerned. Market sentiment and industry expectations play a crucial role in stock price movements. With 14 analyst ratings, it's essential for investors to stay informed about Adobe's performance and market trends.

news.headline: Alveo Technologies and Fraunhofer partner to create rapid feline respiratory panel test for influenza, calicivirus, herpes virus-1 with results in minutes.
news.summary: Two companies are collaborating to create a rapid test for feline influenza, calicivirus, and herpes virus-1 which will offer precise results within minutes at the point of need in ALAMEDA, California. The collaboration was announced on December 10, 2024, by Alveo Technologies, Inc. (Alveo), a prominent company in molecular sensing and diagnostics. This innovative test will significantly reduce wait times for diagnosis and is expected to streamline the testing process for veterinarians and pet owners.

news.headline: $MU Micron wins a chips incentives from the commerce department.
Macy's to report $-0.01 EPS, historical performance shows a mix of exceeded and missed estimates. Stock down 13.7% YoY. Neutral rating.

Investors are eager for news of surpassing estimates and positive guidance for the next quarter, as guidance can significantly impact stock prices. news.headline: Vascarta presents transdermal gel at ASH Conference, reduces nerve damage in sickle cell disease.
news.summary: In San Diego on December 10, 2024, Vascarta Inc. unveiled groundbreaking research data at the 66th Annual American Society of Hematology gathering. The study demonstrated that Vascarta's innovative transdermal formulation of curcumin successfully mitigates nerve and organ harm. Additionally, the preparation showed enhancements in red blood cell function.

news.headline: Wildfire Systems Inc. saves consumers over $1 billion in 2024 with loyalty programs in 50+ countries.
news.summary: Wildfire Systems Inc., a cutting-edge financial technology platform that drives loyalty and reward programs, is broadening its global reach for white label loyalty programs. Rewards are being distributed to users of its clients across more than 50 countries. This expansion demonstrates the company's commitment to providing a seamless and efficient rewards system on a vast scale. The development comes as Wildfire Systems Inc. continues to solidify its position as a leader in the industry. The announcement was made in San Diego on December 10, 2024.

news.headline: Dataminr selects 2024 AI for Good partners to scale humanitarian efforts through AI. Leading AI company.
news.summary: Dataminr, a prominent AI company, has teamed up with social good organizations to enhance humanitarian and human rights efforts through artificial intelligence technology. This partnership was revealed on December 10, 2024, in New York. The company unveiled its 2024 AI for Good Partners, marking a significant step forward in leveraging AI for positive impact.

news.headline: ProvLabs completes seed funding, separates from Provenance Blockchain Foundation. Offers APIs for financial institutions.
news.summary: A technological company specializing in blockchain infrastructure, ProvLabs, successfully separates from the Provenance Blockchain Foundation. The company offers APIs and SaaS solutions that empower financial institutions to implement digital assets extensively on Provenance Blockchain, the leading Layer 1 platform for real-world assets. This transition signifies a significant development in the blockchain industry and opens opportunities for financial services firms to leverage the capabilities of Provenance Blockchain.

news.headline: Pontera and Independent Advisor Alliance join to assist 235+ advisors in 27 states in optimizing client wealth and secure retirements.
news.summary: A fintech company called Pontera™ has announced that over 235 advisors across 27 states are now able to oversee clients' 401(k) accounts, offering tailored investment advice. The service aims to provide comprehensive management for retirement savers. This recent development was revealed in New York and Charlotte, N.C. on December 10, 2024.

news.headline: Saint Vincent Hospital in Worcester, MA enhances safety with advanced technology for access control and video surveillance. Serving Central MA since 1893, prioritizes patient, visitor, and staff well-being.
news.summary: A healthcare provider in Central Massachusetts, Saint Vincent Hospital based in Worcester, MA, has recently improved its access control and video surveillance systems to boost safety measures. The hospital, serving the Central Massachusetts community since 1893, prioritizes the health and safety of its patients, visitors, and staff. This update aims to enhance security within the facility, ensuring a safer environment for all individuals.

Investors are eagerly awaiting the announcement, with hopes of exceeding expectations and receiving optimistic guidance for the future. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: ASM Global appoints Lance Zanett as General Manager of Colorado Convention Center, with over 25 years of experience.
news.summary: In Denver, Colorado, ASM Global, a top development and live events company globally, has appointed Lance Zanett as the new general manager of the renowned Colorado Convention Center. Zanett, with a robust background of over 25 years at the venue and most recently serving as assistant general manager, brings invaluable leadership and operational skills that have significantly contributed to the success of CCC. His promotion signifies ASM Global’s commitment to leveraging capable individuals within their organization for key positions.

news.headline: 7 Brew names Nick Chavez as first CMO, emphasizing his expertise in building consumer relationships.
news.summary: Nick Chavez has been appointed as the Chief Marketing Officer of 7 Brew in Fayetteville, Ark. Known for its quick service, top-notch drinks, and vibrant atmosphere, 7 Brew is making waves in the beverage industry. Chavez, a seasoned brand strategist, has joined the team to enhance the company's marketing efforts. With a history of driving consumer engagement and achieving tangible outcomes for well-known brands, Chavez is set to strengthen 7 Brew's brand presence. This move signifies the company's commitment to growth and innovation.

news.headline: Experian marks one year of The Legacy League Game Show™, benefiting HBCU and HSI students in financial literacy.
news.summary: Experian, based in Costa Mesa, California, is marking the one-year milestone of The Legacy League Game Show™. This initiative aims to educate and involve young adults in financial literacy.

news.headline: MCR secures $300 million refinancing for 22-hotel portfolio with 2,855 guestrooms across 14 states.
news.summary: In New York, MCR, the nation's third-largest hotel owner-operator, has successfully obtained a $300 million refinancing deal for a portfolio of 22 hotels. These hotels, which have a total of 2,855 guestrooms, are located in 14 states including Texas, Florida, New Mexico, and South Carolina. The properties are situated in both established and high-growth markets. MCR's in-house operations team, consisting of around 7,000 professionals, manages these hotels. The acquisition of these properties occurred from 2017 to 2020, with subsequent investments totaling $65 million.

news.headline: RLTYco partners with Forbes Global Properties; US members get priority access to services like RLTY Capital.
news.summary: In New York, RLTYco, a full-service provider for real estate professionals, has partnered with Forbes Global Properties. This collaboration grants US-based members of the Forbes Global Properties network exclusive access to RLTYco's services. They can now utilize RLTY Capital to obtain commission funding within 24 hours. This partnership eases compliance and regulation burdens for real estate agents.

news.headline: Urgent: Study warns Congress of potential financial impact on 2M seniors without LTC pharmacy services.
news.summary: In Washington, a recent study by the Senior Care Pharmacy Coalition (SCPC) has shed light on the substantial financial implications of Medicare drug price negotiations for long-term care (LTC) pharmacies. Conducted by CLA (CliftonLarsonAllen LLP) in collaboration with ATI Advisory, the report emphasizes the crucial services provided by LTC pharmacies to over two million seniors and individuals in long-term care. SCPC underscores that the study's outcomes effectively showcase the potential impact of Medicare drug price negotiations on this sector.

news.headline: Suzano saves R$76 million and improves sustainability with Gurobi software.
news.summary: In Beaverton, Oregon, Suzano has generated approximately R$76 million in new opportunities by harmonizing sustainability with profitability.

news.headline: New Willo AutoFlo+: First fully automated toothbrush for children. Launch in New York.
news.summary: New York has introduced the groundbreaking Willo AutoFlo+, the world's first fully automated toothbrush designed for children. This innovative product is set to revolutionize oral hygiene routines for youngsters around the globe.

news.headline: Cleo's report finds that only a small percentage of supply chain jobs require essential software and AI knowledge.
news.summary: Cleo, a company specializing in B2B Integration, released data from its latest Supply Chain Jobs Report, which examines public listings for supply chain positions.

news.headline: Loop in Columbus, Ohio, acquires Wonderment to enhance commerce operations for e-commerce brands and eliminate friction.
news.summary: In Columbus, Ohio, Loop has acquired Wonderment to streamline commerce operations touchpoints, reduce friction, and boost growth for e-commerce brands. This acquisition aims to enhance the efficiency and effectiveness of e-commerce businesses.

news.headline: Ideal Living has introduced AquaTru Carafe Smart, a Wi-Fi- and app-compatible water purifier. Users can monitor water quality and filter life in real-time.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, Ideal Living unveiled the AquaTru Carafe Smart, an extension of its AquaTru water purifier range. This innovative product features Wi-Fi and app connectivity, enabling users to conveniently assess water quality, track filter longevity, and guarantee safe drinking water on-the-go. With increasing worries surrounding water contamination, the AquaTru Carafe Smart offers real-time monitoring for peace of mind. The launch comes amidst rising concerns regarding water safety, making it a timely solution.

news.headline: Consumers seek AI assistance for smarter shopping; NielsenIQ study reveals potential for impact.
news.summary: In Chicago, the integration of Artificial Intelligence (AI) is transforming consumer behavior and professional environments. As AI gains traction, consumers are anticipating its wider application in their daily lives. The consumer interest is notably peaked in the realm of shopping, where the potential for AI impact is perceived as significant. According to NielsenIQ (NIQ), a prominent global market intelligence entity, insights reveal a strong inclination towards leveraging AI for enhancing consumer experiences. This trend underscores the evolving landscape of AI adoption, exemplifying its promising role in shaping consumer interactions and preferences.

news.headline: Twilio listed in Leaders Category of IDC MarketScape for Worldwide Customer Data Platforms focused on B2C users in 2024-2025.
news.summary: San Francisco -- Twilio Inc. (NYSE: TWLO) has been recognized in the Leaders Category of the IDC MarketScape for Worldwide Customer Data Platforms serving B2C users in 2024-2025. The evaluation assessed CDP solution capabilities such as real-time personalization, generative AI, and data activation. Twilio's position highlights its commitment to driving personalized experiences for top brands. This acknowledgement underscores Twilio's industry-leading role in customer engagement platforms.

news.headline: Cart.com acquires OceanX to boost Health & Beauty sector. Acquisition solidifies Cart.com's logistics leadership. Bill Guthy joins Cart.com.
news.summary: In Houston, Cart.com, a prominent unified commerce solutions provider, has successfully purchased OceanX, the fulfillment operations subsidiary of Guthy-Renker. This strategic acquisition bolsters Cart.com's standing as a key player in mid-market to enterprise-level logistics and enhances its technological abilities to assist high-volume beauty, wellness, and lifestyle brands. Bill Guthy, the Co-Founder and Co-Chairman of Guthy-Renker, will additionally join Cart.com as a strategic advisor to contribute to the company's growth.

news.headline: Seattle partners with Talkspace to provide virtual therapy to over 55,000 teens and young adults to address mental health needs.
news.summary: In Seattle, the City has revealed a fresh collaboration between the Department of Education and Early Learning (DEEL) and Talkspace, a prominent online behavioral health care provider. This initiative aims to enhance virtual therapy and mental health services for teenagers and young adults in the area. With more than 55,000 individuals set to benefit, this program will offer confidential and top-notch mental health assistance using Talkspace’s secure online platform, addressing the pressing demand for accessible support.

news.headline: Fortune Brands raises quarterly dividend to $0.25 per share, payable on March 12, 2025, to stockholders on record as of Feb 21, 2025.
news.summary: Fortune Brands Innovations, Inc. (NYSE: FBIN) headquartered in Deerfield, Illinois, has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.25 per common share. The dividend, announced on December 9, 2024, will be payable on March 12, 2025, to stockholders of record as of February 21, 2025. The company focuses on transforming spaces into havens and aims to elevate every life through innovation.

news.headline: Carter Lassy joins SheerID as Chief Product Officer, bringing 20+ years of experience in digital marketing, advertising, and eCommerce.
news.summary: In Portland, Oregon, SheerID, a prominent company specializing in identity verification for top brands worldwide, has recently named Carter Lassy as their new Chief Product Officer. Lassy boasts a wealth of expertise, with more than twenty years in digital marketing, advertising, and eCommerce within B2B and B2C SaaS environments. This appointment underscores SheerID's commitment to assembling a first-rate leadership cohort, following the recruitment of numerous seasoned martech and SaaS professionals.

news.headline: Totino's Pizza Rolls to debut Big Game ad on February 9, 2025, marking General Mills return after a decade.
news.summary: In Minneapolis, on February 9, Totino’s Pizza Rolls is set to make a notable appearance at the 2025 Big Game, marking General Mills' return to the event after a hiatus of over 10 years. This move signals the company's commitment to enhancing its popular brands, with Totino’s Pizza Rolls becoming the first frozen pizza product to be showcased during prime time at the premier sporting event. This strategic decision demonstrates General Mills' dedication to solidifying its presence in the market and providing consumers with beloved and convenient pizza snacks.

news.headline: Switzerland's cashback programs market set to grow with 13.2% annual surge in spending - ResearchAndMarkets.com.
news.summary: A recent report on Switzerland Cashback Programs Market Opportunities has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The report provides over 50 key performance indicators (KPIs) on the market size of cashback programs in Switzerland, categorized by business model, channel, program type, and end-use sector, with updates as of Q3 2024. It is anticipated that cashback spending in Switzerland will see notable expansion, with a projected annual surge of 13.2%. This growth outlook extends to the medium to long-term for cashback spending in Switzerland.

news.headline: Veolia partners with WFX Water Roundtable to address $1 trillion infrastructure gap in U.S. water systems, aiding underserved communities.
news.summary: In Paramus, New Jersey, it is estimated that America's water and wastewater infrastructure requires a substantial investment of $1 trillion to address the backlog of maintenance and upgrades. However, numerous communities are facing obstacles such as insufficient funding, lack of organization, and technical capabilities to address these issues. To address this challenge, Veolia North America, the leading private water services operator in the U.S., is teaming up with Water Finance Exchange (WFX), a reputable nonprofit dedicated to enhancing the nation's water infrastructure. This partnership aims to provide support and solutions for communities struggling with their water systems.

news.headline: SCS Technologies introduces Skid Tracker™ portal for project visibility, communication during fabrication process. #CleanEnergy #Innovation.
news.summary: In Houston, SCS Technologies (SCS), a prominent company offering CO2 measurement systems, methane vapor recovery units, and petroleum LACT units, unveiled their latest development - the Skid Tracker™ customer portal. This online platform allows clients to have real-time access and communication with the project team throughout the fabrication process. With a focus on innovation and dependable delivery, SCS aims to enhance customer experience. The portal revolutionizes tracking of VRU and LACT unit projects for clients, reflecting SCS's dedication to efficiency and transparency.

news.headline: Intersect Power partners with Google and TPG Rise Climate to bring renewable power to new data centers, aiming at $20B investment by 2030.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Intersect Power, LLC, has revealed a new collaboration with Google and TPG Rise Climate to offer large-scale renewable energy and storage options for upcoming data centers. The partnership aims to facilitate the establishment of gigawatts of fresh data center capacity throughout the United States. Intersect Power is set to ignite a focused $20 billion investment in renewable power infrastructure by the conclusion of the decade. The venture has already initiated its efforts.

news.headline: Chevron upgrades Pasadena refinery, increasing capacity to 125,000 barrels/day with expanded product flexibility. Strategic move for Gulf Coast refining system.
news.summary: Chevron U.S.A., Inc. (CUSA), a subsidiary of Chevron Corporation, has finished retrofitting its Pasadena, Texas refinery to enhance product flexibility and boost processing capacity of lighter crudes by almost 15%, reaching 125,000 barrels daily. The acquisition of the Pasadena Refinery in 2019 was part of Chevron's plan to grow its Gulf Coast refining system. This development is set to facilitate the company's expansion efforts.

news.headline: Nextracker ships first U.S.-made solar trackers; 570 MW solar project to use 100% domestic content.
news.summary: Nextracker (Nasdaq: NXT), a prominent player in solar tracker technology, has unveiled the inaugural set of U.S.-manufactured solar trackers in the United States. These trackers are projected to meet the requirement for 100% domestic content value for solar trackers as per the Inflation Reduction Act (IRA). The initial recipient of these domestically produced trackers is the Pelican’s Jaw project by SB Energy. This project, boasting a capacity of 570 MW for solar and 954 MWh for storage, marks a significant milestone in fostering domestic manufacturing in the solar industry.

news.headline: Clarum Advisors launches Energy Transition Advisory Practice to speed up low-carbon economy shift with ClearSky's support.
news.summary: In West Palm Beach, Florida, Clarum Advisors unveiled its Energy Transition Advisory Practice, with the goal of expediting the transition to a low-carbon economy worldwide. This strategic move is backed by ClearSky, a firm specializing in investments in cybersecurity and energy transition. The Advisory Practice will work alongside top companies and emerging players in advancing pioneering solutions in the energy sector.

news.headline: Aspen Tech helps leading energy transmission firm deliver 99.99% power reliability across 16,395 miles in Latin America.
news.summary: Aspen Technology, Inc., a leading industrial software company, revealed that Interconexión Eléctrica S.A. E.S.P. (ISA) in Latin America, the largest energy transmission firm in the region, is utilizing its Digital Grid Management (DGM) solutions. These tools are enabling ISA to achieve a remarkable 99.99% reliability across about 16,395 miles of circuit infrastructure. The partnership between ISA and AspenTech aims to guarantee that power remains accessible, secure, and consistently available to the population.

news.headline: Enventure Global Technology deploys innovative expandable liner hanger in Permian Basin in a record two-week timeline, showcasing reliability and simplicity for oil operations.
news.summary: Enventure Global Technology, known for its innovative solid expandable oilfield solutions, has recently finalized the installation of an advanced expandable liner hanger in the Permian Basin for a key operator. The noteworthy accomplishment was accomplished within an impressive two-week timeframe, showcasing the company's ability to provide tailored manufacturing to align with the unique requirements of the well design. This success underscores the adaptability and efficiency of the system with its modular design, ensuring unparalleled reliability and ease of use within the oil and gas industry.

news.headline: Rick Hanson appointed President of Go-to-Market at Forcepoint, unifying Sales and CS teams to enhance data security efforts.
news.summary: Forcepoint, a global security leader based in Austin, Texas, has welcomed Rick Hanson as the new President of Go-to-Market. Hanson will oversee the Sales and Customer Success teams and report directly to CEO Ryan Windham. This strategic appointment underscores Forcepoint's dedication to assisting enterprises and governments in safeguarding their crucial data through the Data Security Everywhere architecture. Amid the proliferation of data across hybrid settings, Hanson's role will play a vital part in enhancing Forcepoint's mission.
